title: Quantifiers
topics: countable · uncountable · some/any · much/many · few/little · enough/too
description: Kvantifikátory — some, any, much, many, few, little, a lot of...
notes: SOME → affirmative: I have some eggs.
A FEW / A LITTLE = some, but not much → POSITIVE meaning
FEW / LITTLE = almost none → NEGATIVE/pessimistic meaning

quiz.sentence: I need ___ minutes — just wait! (small positive)
She has ___ knowledge of the subject. (almost none)
How ___ money do you need? (uncountable, question)
There are ___ people in the queue today. (excessive)

tasks: 1. Describe what's in your fridge using quantifiers (some, a few, a lot of, no...)
2. Write 5 sentences about your city using much/many/a lot of/few/little
3. Write a complaint letter mentioning problems using too much/too many
